description: A stevedoring supervisor needs to ensure there is enough lashing equipment (e.g., twistlocks, lashing bars) for the next vessel.

nodes.task_description: Check the current inventory of lashing gear in the storage cages.

expected_outcome.value: Supervisor performs a physical count or checks the inventory system.

nodes.task_description: Identify a shortage of automatic twistlocks.

expected_outcome.value: The count reveals that they are below the minimum required stock level.

nodes.task_description: Place an order with the procurement department for new twistlocks.

expected_outcome.value: A purchase requisition for 500 new twistlocks is created.
